title: automatically fill columns from previous item
excerpt:
hi, is there possible to automatically fill new items some columns from previous items columns with automations or some integrations? i need to fill some fields automatically  when item is created. 
please let me know if…

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi, is there possible to automatically fill new items some columns from previous items columns with automations or some integrations? i need to fill some fields automatically when item is created.
please let me know if there is a solution, thank you in advance

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: It depends, how are you creating the new item? ie you could have a status/button on an existing item and when it’s selected, that a new item is created pulling in the data from the original item? Or are you wanting ALL Items on a board to pull from a specific item? We’d need a bit more detail to answer.

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi Desiree, thank you for reply.
im working in one board and in one group. im adding new item from “new item” button.
and when i add new item i want some column fields to fill automatically from previous items already filled column fields. for example new items “start value” to refill automatically from previous items “end value” column.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Got it! I haven’t done that it in the past, but there are template automations for ‘dependencies’
